tasks.subject: Task 0: Schema + dependency + configx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land migration for require_verified_email, add zitadel/oidc/v3 dep, regenerate sqlc.

**Files:** db/migrations/006_federation_v03.sql (new) OR amend 004; db/queries/upstream_idp.sql (modify); go.mod/go.sum.

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go build ./... && mise exec -- go test ./pkg/db/... ./pkg/configx/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["db/migrations/006_federation_v03.sql", "db/queries/upstream_idp.sql", "go.mod"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["migration applies cleanly", "require_verified_email defaults to true", "zitadel/oidc/v3 in go.mod", "sqlc regenerated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: AES-GCM helper for client secrets
tasks.description:
**Goal:** EncryptClientSecret/DecryptClientSecret with AAD `'upstream_idp:'+id+':'+keyVersion`. Mirrors totp/aead.go.

**Files:** pkg/federation/oidc/secret.go (new) + secret_test.go.

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/... -run TestSecret -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/federation/oidc/secret.go", "pkg/federation/oidc/secret_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/... -run TestSecret -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AES-256-GCM round-trip", "AAD bound to id+key_version", "Wrong AAD rejected", "Wrong key rejected", "Non-32-byte DEK rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: In-process mock OIDC OP
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Minimal in-process OP with Discovery + Authorize + Token + JWKS endpoints. ES256 signing. Test hooks for claims/error/issuer-override.

**Files:** cmd/smoke/mockop/server.go (new) + server_test.go.

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./cmd/smoke/mockop/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/smoke/mockop/server.go", "cmd/smoke/mockop/server_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./cmd/smoke/mockop/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["discovery doc serves", "authorize redirects with code+iss", "token endpoint validates PKCE S256", "ES256-signed id_token", "test hooks for claims/error/iss-override"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: OIDC RP client wrapper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wrap zitadel/oidc/v3 RP client into pkg/federation/oidc/client.go. Discovery cache, JWKS, code exchange, ID-token verify with alg allowlist (RS256/ES256/EdDSA only).

**Files:** pkg/federation/oidc/client.go (new) + client_test.go.

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/... -run TestClient -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/federation/oidc/client.go", "pkg/federation/oidc/client_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/... -run TestClient -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["NewClient discovers + caches", "AuthURL has PKCE S256 + nonce", "Exchange verifies iss against expected_iss", "Exchange verifies nonce", "alg allowlist enforced"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: State KV + Mode policies
tasks.description:
**Goal:** FedState (login + link prefixes), applyAutoProvision/applyInviteOnly/applyLinkOnly + Resolve dispatcher. Username collision, email_verified, allowed_domains, claim sync on re-login.

**Files:** pkg/federation/oidc/{state.go, state_test.go, modes.go, modes_test.go} (new).

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/federation/oidc/state.go", "pkg/federation/oidc/modes.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FedState encode/decode", "LoginKey != LinkKey", "AutoProvision happy path", "email_verified=false rejected", "username collision rejected", "link_only no-link rejected", "existing identity syncs claims"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Federator orchestration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace stubs in pkg/federation/oidc/federation.go. BeginLogin / HandleCallback / LinkBegin / LinkCallback composing client + state + modes.

**Files:** pkg/federation/oidc/federation.go (modify) + federation_test.go + db/queries/upstream_idp.sql (add GetUpstreamIDPByID).

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/federation/oidc/federation.go", "pkg/federation/oidc/federation_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BeginLogin stashes state via LoginKey", "HandleCallback Pops state", "RFC 9207 iss validated when present", "disabled account rejected post-Resolve", "LinkBegin uses LinkKey + LinkingAccountID", "LinkCallback validates session matches LinkingAccountID"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Authn flow extension + error constructors
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AvailableMethods includes MethodFederationOIDC when identities present. 8 new error constructors.

**Files:** pkg/authn/{flow.go, errors.go, flow_test.go} (modify).

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/authn/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/authn/flow.go", "pkg/authn/errors.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/authn/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AvailableMethods returns federation when identities exist", "federation only returns [MethodFederationOIDC]", "webauthn+federation returns [webauthn, federation]", "8 new error constructors with correct status/code"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Federation HTTP endpoints
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /auth/federation/{slug}/login + /callback. return_to validation, upstream error handling, session issuance with amr passthrough.

**Files:** pkg/server/handle_federation.go (new) + handle_federation_test.go.

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/server/... -run TestFederation -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_federation.go", "pkg/server/handle_federation_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/server/... -run TestFederation -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["login redirects to upstream", "callback auto-provisions and issues session", "upstream error returns 4xx upstream_error", "email_verified=false → 403", "invalid return_to → 400", "rate limit applied"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: /me/identities HTTP endpoints
tasks.description:
**Goal:** List, unlink (last-method check), link-begin (sudo), link-callback. Session-required throughout.

**Files:** pkg/server/handle_me_identities.go (new) + handle_me_identities_test.go.

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/server/... -run TestMeIdentities -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_me_identities.go", "pkg/server/handle_me_identities_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/server/... -run TestMeIdentities -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["list returns array shape", "unlink-last rejected with last_sign_in_method", "unlink-with-backup 204", "link-begin sudo-gated", "link-callback validates session matches state.LinkingAccountID"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Server wiring + route mounts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Server struct gains federator field; 6 routes mounted.

**Files:** pkg/server/server.go (modify).

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go build ./... && mise exec -- go test ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Federator constructed in NewServer", "6 routes mounted", "go build clean", "existing tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: cmd/smoke v0.3 extension
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ~15 new smoke steps against mock OP + live PG. Covers all v0.3 surface end-to-end.

**Files:** cmd/smoke/main.go (modify).

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go run ./cmd/smoke -username smoke-v03-admin` → all steps green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/smoke/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go run ./cmd/smoke -username smoke-v03-admin", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all v0.2 steps still green", "federation login → callback works", "DB asserts account_identity and credential_event rows", "re-login claim sync verified", "email_verified=false rejected", "username collision rejected", "invalid return_to rejected", "upstream error mapped", "link_only rejection works", "self-service link works", "unlink-last rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Documentation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** STATUS.md, AUDIT.md, INTEGRATION.md updated to reflect v0.3 reality. Anchored to smoke steps.

**Files:** STATUS.md, AUDIT.md, INTEGRATION.md (modify).

**Verify:** Manual read-through.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["STATUS.md", "AUDIT.md", "INTEGRATION.md"], "verifyCommand": "git diff --stat", "acceptanceCriteria": ["STATUS.md v0.3 section with smoke-covered/untested lists", "AUDIT.md federation rows flipped to smoke-verified", "INTEGRATION.md has 4 federation curl examples"]}
```
